name: Oatmeal Cinnamon Scones
recipeInstructions:
1. Position rack in the center of the oven and preheat to 375 degrees.
2. In a large bowl, sift together the flour, sugars, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
3. Add oatmeal and mix until combined.
4. Distribute the butter cubes over the flour mixture.
5. Using your fingertips, quickly rub the butter into the flour mixture until it resembles coarse meal.
6. In a medium bowl, stir together the buttermilk (or cream or milk), egg, vanilla, and zest.
7. Add the liquid mixture to the flour mixture. Stir gently with a large rubber spatula using as few strokes as possible until the dough is moistened and begins to cling together.
8. Handle the dough as little as possible until all ingredients are completely combined.
9. Using a 1/3-cup measuring cup, drop the dough onto an ungreased baking sheet, leaving at least 1-inch between the scones.
10. Bake for 16 to 18 minutes or until golden brown.
11. Cool on the baking sheet set on a wire rack for 5 minutes.
12. Using a rubber spatula, transfer the scones to the wire rack and cool completely.
13. Serve warm or store cooled scones in an airtight container at room temperature.
